# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what knowledge, examples, or fixes this PR adds.

## Topic

- [ ] Laravel
- [ ] NativePHP
- [ ] Offline sync/local DB
- [ ] API
- [ ] Payments/webhooks
- [ ] Sockets/realtime
- [ ] MySQL/performance
- [ ] Debugging/emulator
- [ ] Deployment/incidents
- [ ] Security
- [ ] GPT setup/instructions
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited source Markdown files, not only `upload-ready/`.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private data, private URLs, or customer data.
- [ ] I included practical commands/code/checklists where useful.
- [ ] I added warnings for destructive or risky actions.
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if I added a new file or major topic.
- [ ] I regenerated `upload-ready/` if source knowledge changed.

## Notes For Reviewers

Mention anything version-specific, uncertain, or needing extra verification.
